hooks.command: f=$(jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // empty'); case "$f" in *.go) [ -f "$f" ] && gofmt -w "$f" ;; esac

f=$(jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // empty'); case "$f" in *go.sum|*/go.sum|*flake.lock|*/flake.lock|*/coverage*.out|*/dist/*|*/.build/*|dist/*|.build/*) printf 'blocked: %s is generated/managed by tooling (go mod tidy / flake-update / goreleaser / nix). Do not hand-edit.\n' "$f" >&2; exit 2 ;; esac
